mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity, subtotal ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_item_id, order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity, subtotal FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
